title: Schedule invoice finalization to send or charge an invoice in the future
excerpt: Learn how to schedule an invoice and automatically send or charge for it on a future date. You can create an invoice on Stripe today and [finalize](https://docs.stripe.com/invoicing/integration/workflow-transitions.md) or charge for it on a future date. > When you use a custom finalization time for invoices, finalization won’t be delayed because of `invoice.created` webhook failures. This is different from the behavior described in the [Webhooks and invoices](https://docs.stripe.com/billing/subscriptions/webhooks.md#understand) guidance. To configure an automatic finalization time for an invoice, you must have [automatic invoice advancement](https://docs.stripe.com/invoicing/integration/automatic-advancement-collection.md) enabled for the invoice.…
